html:
Exclusive to:

The Guard Tower Kit can be crafted at the Sanctum Smithy. Once placed, it becomes a Guard Tower Site that can be upgraded.

Guard Tower Site

The Guard Tower Site can be upgraded with 8 Thulecite, 8 Moon Rock and 8 Cut Stone. Once fully upgraded, it becomes a Guard Tower.

Hammering the Guard Tower Site will return all 4 Ancient Guard Tower Pieces and the materials that has been used to upgrade the site.

Guard Tower

The Guard Tower is a structure that looks similar to Ancient Tower without moss. It can be activated by inserting a Security Pulse, through a Waymark Compass or Spark Ark, to turn into a active Guard Tower.

Hammering the Guard Tower will return all 4 Ancient Guard Tower Pieces and half of the upgrading materials.

Trivia

  • The Guard Tower Kit were introduced in the Cursed Confrontation Part 1 update.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Bộ Tháp Bảo vệ có thể được chế tạo tại Sanctum Smithy. Sau khi được đặt, nó sẽ trở thành Địa điểm Tháp Bảo vệ có thể được nâng cấp.
